notes:
Hotfix: 1.30.0 could hang on the loading screen for some users - fixed
New bot folders just work - OPTiC sets the Windows 7 compatibility the bot needs, so a fresh copy pulls your login on the first launch
Fixed the 'localhost refused to connect' error when reopening (single-instance + port retry)
The map now removes razed and teleported-away cities after every full sweep
Prestige Monitor header no longer cuts off its numbers
Security and Light-theme polish, plus a fresh-install fix
